steps.title: Undo the outside multiplication
steps.content: The original equation is $$7(2x-3)=63.$$ Divide both sides by $7$ to keep the same solution while simplifying the equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Choice B divides incorrectly. Choices C and D distribute only part of the $7$; correct distribution would give $14x-21=63$.
